channel.title: NAFJ Mayer, F Ratzinger, RLJ Schmidt, G Greiner, O Landt, A Am Ende, VM Corman, N Perkmann-Nagele, T Watkins-Riedel, D Petermann, K Abadir, J Zweimüller-Mayer, R Strassl | PlatCOVID

item.title: Development of a fully automated high throughput PCR for the detection of SARS-CoV-2: The need for speed.
